raw_text: Ella Core panics on malformed NGAP Location Report ## Summary Ella Core panics when processing a malformed NGAP LocationReport message with `ue-presence-in-area-of-interest` event type and omitting the optional `UEPresenceInAreaOfInterestList` IE. ## Impact An attacker able to send crafted NGAP messages to Ella Core can crash the process, causing service disruption for all connected subscribers. No authentication is required. ## Fix Added IE presence verification to NGAP message handling.
